org.apache.juneau.commons.runtime.Args.Builder

Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.commons.runtime
Runtime / process-entry data carriers.

  • Uses of Args.Builder in org.apache.juneau.commons.runtime

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.commons.runtime that return Args.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Args.Builder
    Args.Builder.allowEquals(boolean value)
    Enables or disables recognition of the --key=value / -key=value form.
    Args.Builder
    Args.Builder.allowLongFlags(boolean value)
    Enables or disables recognition of long-flag prefix --.
    Args.Builder
    Args.Builder.allowShortFlags(boolean value)
    Enables or disables recognition of short-flag prefix -.
    Args.Builder
    Args.Builder.allowSystemPropStyle(boolean value)
    Enables or disables Java system-property style -Dkey=value parsing (strips the leading D).
    Args.Builder
    Args.Builder.caseSensitive(boolean value)
    Controls whether named-option lookups are case-sensitive.
    static Args.Builder
    Args.create()
    Creates a new builder for parsing arguments with non-default grammar.
    Args.Builder
    Args.Builder.customPrefix(String... prefixes)
    Overrides the default flag prefixes ("-" and "--").
